events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the observed condition — an incorrect voltage-class rating or an overdue dielectric retest date on rubber insulating gloves — is treated as a **fail**, **critical** risk, since it invalidates the primary shock/arc-flash barrier for energized work, with corrective actions (remove from service, reissue correctly rated/tested gloves, verify against NFPA 70E 130.7(C)(7) and OSHA 1910.137) documented.
